description: You are a compliance officer remediating findings from a regulatory audit. A note titled 'Compliance-Audit-Findings' has been placed in the Projects workspace with detailed remediation instructions for two documents. Open the findings note, read it carefully, and execute every remediation step it specifies. The findings involve: (1) correcting a document published to the wrong section — unpublish it, update its metadata, create a major version, and republish to the correct section; (2) updating an outdated document — replace its file, apply a compliance tag, create a major version, revoke an external user's access, and publish it; and (3) post-remediation documentation — create a summary note and a compliance collection containing all remediated materials. All specific document names, metadata values, file paths, target sections, and user accounts are detailed in the audit findings note.
